If you decide to use a Weixin Service, it will be governed by the Agreement on Software License and Service of Tencent Weixin and Weixin Privacy Protection Guidelines. As this Weixin Service which you intend to use is provided from the mainland of China, in accordance with international standard industry practice, data related to this Weixin Service will be stored locally in the mainland of China. Other than this Weixin Service, your data and use of WeChat will otherwise remain unaffected, governed by WeChat's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy."
Services above may be enabled/disabled via \"Me\" > \"Settings\" > \"General\" > \"Manage Discover\".

Certain services available within WeChat, but only available if you choose to enable them. These services are operated by Tencent in the Chinese Mainland. Select the services you wish to enable and use below.

"Information collected by Weixin during your use of Mini Programs (including browsing activity, access history, and order info) will be permanently deleted 30 days after you disable the service. Information provided directly to Mini Program operators will not be cleared. Manage your information in each Mini Program's settings."

After the service has been disabled for 30 days, your access history with the current WeChat account (including data such as following, likes, recommendations, and comments) will be permanently deleted.
By doing so, you can no longer access game-related services. You may enable it at any time.
After the service has been disabled for 30 days, your personal search information (including search history and custom settings) will be permanently deleted.
Your access history will be permanently deleted if you disable the service and do not enable it within 30 days.

"The price you will pay for your purchase is a fixed price denominated in Renminbi, the currency of the People's Republic of China (\"RMB\").

You have not been informed of the actual RMB price for your purchase. Instead, you have been informed of an approximate value in US dollars (\"USD\") of the actual RMB price. The approximate USD price uses historical, not real-time, currency exchange rates.

The bank card you will use to pay for your purchase is unlikely to be denominated in RMB.

You will not be charged the approximate USD price for your purchase. The amount you will be charged will be your local currency equivalent (as determined by your bank card issuer) of the actual RMB price.

Your bank card issuer may also charge you other fees for you making a purchase in RMB rather than your local currency.
